headline: Is It Too Late To Consider KLA (KLAC) After A 161% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether KLA at around US$1,750 per share still offers value after a strong run, you are not alone. The stock has returned 18.9% over the last 30 days and 37.3% year to date, while the 1 year return of 160.8% and a very large 3 year gain suggest sentiment has shifted meaningfully, even with a 3.6% pullback over the past week. Recent coverage has highlighted how KLA sits at the center of key semiconductor trends and industry spending cycles, with investors paying close...
